variants.title: Donaldson P950620 Air Panel
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P950620 Air Panel is designed to provide reliable performance in air panel applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: Mann Filter CU 37 230 Cabin Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P950620
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER cabin filters offer almost 100% protection against particles such as pollen, diesel soot and tyre abrasion - for a feel-good climate in the vehicle interior and protection of the air conditioning system. Exact fit and perfect tightness ensure constant filtration performance during the entire service interval / Optimum vehicle interior ventilation due to the high air flow capacity.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF26231 Cabin Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P950620
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF26231 panel cabin air filter provides clean air in the cab which means a clean work environment.  Breathing cleaner air can lead to longer and more productive working hours.
